subject: Geography
title: AI-Generated Maps
description: A quick win: understand AI-Generated Maps.

hook.text: AI can now convert satellite images into detailed maps automatically, without human input.

buildup.text: Machine learning identifies roads, buildings, and waterways from raw imagery.

discovery.text: Facebook used AI to map every building in Africa—nearly 500 million structures.

twist.text: AI maps sometimes 'hallucinate'—adding features that don't exist or missing real ones.

climax.text: Automated mapping can update the whole planet in days, not decades.

punchline.text: Machines now draw maps faster than any human ever could.

quiz.question: What problem can AI mapping have?
options: It can hallucinate features that don't exist
